title: What plug suit would you wear
display_title: What plug suit would you wear
wikitext:
[]: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Lurking2018 » Mon Aug 20, 2018 5:19 pm Out of the choices of plugsuits that have appeared which one would you wear? Would you change anything about the current plugsuits? Would you use any parts from other anime shows (also known as a crossover)?

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by ZQFMGB » Tue Aug 21, 2018 6:01 pm I'd like to wear Rei's plug suit. The one I'd want the least to wear would be Asuka's. I don't think I'd add any crossover parts, the vanilla design is already perfect IMO.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Thu Aug 23, 2018 11:32 am As much as I like shades of blue and purple for clothes, I've always liked Asuka's plugsuit the best. The only change would be the fact that I'm a guy, so I might need a little reshaping on the chest area is all hahah

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by ZQFMGB » Thu Aug 23, 2018 3:43 pm No need to worry, as seen in ep 8, there's a male version of Asuka's suit. BTW, I wonder why Kaworu didn't use that one...

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 23, 2018 4:29 pm ZQFMGB wrote: No need to worry, as seen in ep 8, there's a male version of Asuka's suit. BTW, I wonder why Kaworu didn't use that one...

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Cowboy Unit-03 » Sat Aug 25, 2018 3:11 pm noneouch, also im self conscious

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by ZQFMGB » Sat Aug 25, 2018 7:12 pm Sachi wrote: That's not a male version of Asuka's plugsuit. That's just Asuka's plugsuit that Shinji wears. That's why he covers his crotch, and that's why Kensuke and Toji make fun of his figure.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Aug 26, 2018 2:01 pm [overspecific answer] For casual wearing, I would probably pick ReiQ's Mark.09 suit, as it is the only one without any protruding, probably uncomfortable, parts (would probably have to be adjusted a bit to the fact that I a male and my proportions are a good bit different from Rei's As a suit for any sort of melee fighting (be it in sports or with the intent of harming the other), I'd pick either Mari's provisional Unit 05 suit for the chest padding or Kaworu's Mark.06/any of the Eva 13 ones for their rib-like protrusions at the sides, those could come in handy at deflecting punches. Lastly, for motorcycling, either of the first suits seen in Q (helmets and such) or the T.RIDEN.T suits, helmets and pretty substantial torso protection [/overspecific answer]

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Aug 26, 2018 3:55 pm Plugsuites are ridiculous to wear no matter which one I choose, so I'll go full ridiculous and I'll choose the test suit from 2.0.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Fri Aug 31, 2018 2:15 pm ZQFMGB wrote: Oh. Well, nevermind. ... Crap, now I have images of Kaworu in the same situation popping in my head...

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Sep 04, 2018 1:21 am The one Shinji / Kaworu wear in 3.33.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Lurking2018 » Fri Sep 28, 2018 6:25 pm There seems to be 2 different styles of plugsuits The chest plate design Male version SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Sep 29, 2018 11:41 am I'm a guy so the only logical answer is.... Asuka's Test Suit from 2.0. Lost some weight recently so I would look GOOD in it.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Oct 01, 2018 1:34 pm I like all of them but Rei's (Rei Q's badass black Plug Suit is a major exception), but if I had to choose one, it would be a tie between Kaworu/Shinji's in Q, the Unit 05/Bardiel Test Suit in 2.0, or any of Mari's but the one she wore while piloting Provisional Unit 05. If Yui's Contact Experiment equipment suit thing counts, that's the clear winner for me, I love any sort of wing symbolism.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Akko » Thu Oct 04, 2018 4:54 pm had it not been for my body, I would wear Rei's plugsuit

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Oct 04, 2018 7:28 pm I would wear Asuka's plugsuit so I can smell like Asuka.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Tue Oct 09, 2018 1:42 pm Chuckman wrote: I would wear Asuka's plugsuit so I can smell like Asuka.

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by Derek anthony » Tue Mar 26, 2019 12:05 pm I would wear the male version of the dark blue one with ribs also known on Shinji as the pilot 13 plugsuit And there would be nothing i would change

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by 天使 | Nyo | 天使 » Tue Sep 17, 2019 1:28 pm Derek anthony wrote: I would wear the male version of the dark blue one with ribs also known on Shinji as the pilot 13 plugsuit And there would be nothing i would change

[]: Re: What plug suit would you wear?             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Sep 17, 2019 8:03 pm I've always liked Toji's plugsuit.
